final_prompt.prompt:

Subject: must include a young woman resembling 神仙姐姐 holding a sign with both hands, facing the camera

Lighting/mood: needs a warm, well-lit live-stream studio atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours

Materials/textures:

Avoid:
